user_message: Can you work with me on deployment blockers for Coho Winery? I think there's an opportunity here but need to validate.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Eric Kim <eric.kim@cohowinery.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-02-05 14:44 EST
Subject: Re: Re: deployment blockers Timeline

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about deployment blockers. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
To: Eric Kim <eric.kim@cohowinery.com>
Date: 2024-01-08 12:22 EST
Subject: URGENT: deployment blockers Issue at Coho Winery

Our team encountered some challenges with deployment blockers. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?
